title: Some doubts
wikitext:
[]: Some doubts... Post by Tsuki No Nagisa » Sun Jun 24, 2012 4:08 pm Ok so!...um...i don't really know if this goes on EVA chit-chat, it's not so serious so..meh.. Ok, i had some doubts..maybe you could answer... [s]as you know more of evangelion than i do[/s] 1. Why did Kaworu call Gendo father?...i mean...why? father as in he's related to him, or father as in he believes he's married to Shinji? [s] wtf i must stop watching yaoi.dot. [/s] 2. How did eva-01 became that..."god thingy" at the end of Evangelion 2.0? [s]probably because yui is pmsing[/s] 3. Does Kaworu know he's Adam? i mean...he wanted to go to adam in the Terminal dogma until he "realised" it was Lilith. (then i was like wtf? O.o, wasn't HE adam?) and final. 4. Does Embryo!Adam has any relation to Kaworu? I'll be really..um...Grateful? with you if you answered (: [s] or simply re-directed me to that related posts. [/s]

[]: Re: Some doubts... Post by Asami Sato » Sun Jun 24, 2012 4:12 pm Tsuki No Nagisa wrote: 1. Why did Kaworu call Gendo father?...i mean...why? father as in he's related to him, or father as in he believes he's married to Shinji? [s] wtf i must stop watching yaoi.dot. [/s]

[]: Post by Ornette » Sun Jun 24, 2012 4:14 pm Lots of places this is discussed. * Click on this link: http://forum.evageeks.org/search.php * Type "kaworu" and "gendo" and "father" in the text field * Click on Search You can do the same thing with "01" "god" for #2, and for #3 and #4, they are not applicable because there was no embryo and Adam isn't the same thing.
